summary: Iteration 5 — Gallery/Albums feature. Backend: 11/11 pytest cases passed (public list sorted, public single album, 404 on unknown slug, admin CRUD with JWT auth, auto-slug, cover_image default to first image, slug uniqueness '-2' suffix, published flag flips public visibility). Frontend: Homepage gallery section renders 3 album cards with 'Lihat Galeri Lengkap' link to /gallery; clicking a card opens AlbumLightbox with working prev/next buttons, ArrowLeft/ArrowRight keyboard nav, Escape & close-button dismissal, '1 / N' counter and thumbnail strip. /gallery page (gallery-page) renders all 3 albums with album-card-{slug} testids and the same lightbox. Admin (logged in as admin@babatour.com) sees 5 sidebar nav items including admin-nav-gallery; /admin/gallery (admin-gallery-page) lists all seeded albums with Edit / Publish-Unpublish / Delete actions; /admin/gallery/new opens admin-album-editor with album-add-image-btn working. All requested feature flows confirmed working end-to-end.
action_items: Minor: Add data-testid="lightbox-counter" to the '1 / N' counter element in AlbumLightbox.jsx — functionally rendered, currently scraped via regex.
Minor: Add data-testid for the Publish/Unpublish toggle button in AdminGallery.jsx (e.g. `album-publish-{id}`) — review spec hinted at this naming.

Minor (consistency): Spec referenced selectors `admin-album-edit-{id}` and `admin-album-delete-{id}`, but the code uses `album-edit-{id}` and `album-del-{id}`. Not blocking — just naming alignment for future automation.
Optional: Homepage gallery currently shows 3 cards because only 3 albums are seeded. Layout supports up to 4 — verified.
Optional: Admin editor title field uses data-testid="album-title" (not `album-title-input`) — flag for future selector consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: Slug auto-generation handles duplicates correctly with '-2' suffix (verified via repeated POST of same title).
Public endpoints correctly exclude unpublished albums (verified — created draft, GET /api/albums/public/{slug} returned 404 until published=true).
MongoDB _id is excluded from responses — confirmed in admin & public listings.
Backend uses pydantic models for input validation and auto-derives cover_image from first image when empty — correct.
Lightbox keyboard listener attaches only when open and cleans up on close — good React practice.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of critical flows verified (homepage gallery, lightbox keyboard/click nav, /gallery page, admin list, admin editor)

seed_data_creation: Test created 2 transient TEST_ albums via admin API which were deleted at end of test_crud_lifecycle and test_slug_uniqueness_suffix. No residual data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gallery feature fully functional end-to-end. Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iter5_albums.py (run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported in env — pytest does NOT auto-load /app/frontend/.env). Public URL: https://umrah-landing.preview.emergentagent.com. Admin credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Lightbox counter has no data-testid — use page regex on body text for '\d+ / \d+' if asserting in future runs. Admin gallery list rows use selector `[data-testid^="album-row-"]` (NOT `admin-album-row-`).
rca of the issue: N/A — no regressions or bugs found. Earlier scripting confusion was solely due to selector naming mismatches between review-request spec and actual implementation; functionality itself is correct.
